registration._note: Total registered estimated from 2024 total votes / 0.622 (NY avg turnout). NY has party registration; exact county breakdowns unavailable via automated fetch (NY BOE behind Cloudflare). Statewide approx: 49% Dem, 24% GOP, 23% NPP, 4% Other as of Nov 2024.

_meta.source_presidential_2016: NY Times 2016 election results (Clinton/Trump counts) + Dave Leip's Atlas (percentages)
_meta.source_presidential_2024: NY Times 2024 results (total votes) + Dave Leip's Atlas (percentages)
_meta.source_registration: Estimated from 2024 turnout (statewide avg 62.2%); NY BOE county-level enrollment behind Cloudflare
_meta.notes: NY is a fusion voting state. Dem vote = Dem + Working Families lines combined. GOP vote = GOP + Conservative lines combined. Percentages from Dave Leip's Atlas match certified NY BOE results.
